intro: Thelypteris devolvens, also known as the Southern Lady Fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Thelypteris devolvens include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties.
